---
id: generic-project-file-delete
title: "Delete a generic project file"
description: "Delete an app's generic project file. You can fetch an app's generic project file slug if you first list all the uploaded files with the [GET /apps/{app-slug}/generic-project-files](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/generic-project-file/generic-project-file-list) endpoint. Read more in our [Deleting a file](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-files-in-generic-file-storage/#deleting-a-file) guide."
sidebar_label: "Delete a generic project file"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a generic project file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/generic-project-files/{generic-project-file-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete an app's generic project file. You can fetch an app's generic project file slug if you first list all the uploaded files with the [GET /apps/\{app-slug\}/generic-project-files](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/generic-project-file/generic-project-file-list) endpoint. Read more in our [Deleting a file](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-files-in-generic-file-storage/#deleting-a-file) guide.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
